rationale: Equivalence theorem (==) proved by applying thm:qneg twice; the asserted logical equivalence makes def:log-equiv load-bearing, and it was missing -- consistent with the convention of listing def:log-equiv directly on ==-theorems (0037/0038/0039).
notes: The proof also collapses a propositional double negation (not-not phi == phi), but no standalone propositional double-negation node exists in index.json (the only 'double negation' hits are this node, a ring law, and a 'double negation on Q' corollary) -- missing-vocabulary observation, candidate for authoring in the propositional layer; left unproposed.
